name: ChatGPT
desc: OpenAI's flagship model. Best all-rounder for writing, analysis, and coding.

name: Claude
desc: Anthropic's model. Best for long-form writing, nuanced instructions, and safety.

name: Gemini
desc: Google's model. Best for research, ultra-long context, and Google Workspace.

name: Grok
desc: xAI's model with real-time web access. Best for current events and X/Twitter context.

name: DeepSeek
desc: Open-source frontier model. Best for coding, math, and cost-sensitive applications.
